statement: Citizenship clock recalibrated to institutional time (Nenad: '3 months are joke'): full consensus weight at 12 months sustained presence (time AND work AND ~80% epoch consistency), non-linear ramp (weightless first quarter), weight decays on absence (trust maintained, never owned). Credits/rewards flow from day one - rewards fast, power slow. Time+consistency are the entire sybil cost since capital purchase is removed by design.
